title: Gemini Search is now half the price
summary:
A solid day of tuning: Gemini Search gets a 50% price cut, GitHub logins are fixed, and MCP docs are now in the main API reference.

We removed the token markup on `gemini-search`, dropping text input to $0.15/M and completions to $0.60/M. We are absorbing the underlying grounding fees so you get base flash-lite rates.

Restored the correct production credentials for GitHub OAuth. The redirect URI mismatch is gone, and logging into enter.pollinations.ai actually works again.

Wired the MCP server documentation directly into the main gen.pollinations.ai/docs endpoint and Scalar UI. Also cleaned up the README and fixed the local test script.
